data.title: Implement planning-config.sh lib + add config flag + update KNOWN_KEYS
data.description:
Implement the three changes that must be committed atomically (Gate 2: adding flag without KNOWN_KEYS entry breaks validate-config.sh).

## Files to Create/Modify

### 1. CREATE plugins/dso/hooks/lib/planning-config.sh
Bash library sourced by hooks. Exports:
  is_external_dep_block_enabled() — reads planning.external_dependency_block_enabled from dso-config.conf via read-config.sh; returns exit 0 if true, exit 1 otherwise (default false when absent). Follow hooks/lib/red-zone.sh/fuzzy-match.sh pattern.

### 2. MODIFY .claude/dso-config.conf
Add (commented-out default):
  # planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=false

### 3. MODIFY plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh
Add to KNOWN_KEYS array (near preplanning.interactive, line ~119):
  planning.external_dependency_block_enabled

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: GREEN)
Make tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh pass (all 3 tests GREEN). Depends on T1 (88a7-fa68).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-planning-config.sh (exit 0 — all 3 tests GREEN)
- Verify: shellcheck plugins/dso/hooks/lib/planning-config.sh
- Verify: test -x plugins/dso/hooks/lib/planning-config.sh (chmod +x applied)
- Verify: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' .claude/dso-config.conf
- Verify: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh
- Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh .claude/dso-config.conf (exit 0 — no unknown keys)
